items.title: X post from @oscarsspiastree: Oscar in the press conference: "On a personal level, we have a good understanding as to why the…
items.title_zh: X 发帖：Piastri 正赛相关动态
items.summary: Oscar in the press conference: "On a personal level, we have a good understanding as to why the race in Barcelona was such a struggle for me. As a team, Ferrari took a big step forward, Mercedes are still the benchmark and I'm hearing that Red Bull have things here as well. So, it won't be easy for us. To do it on merit or pure pace is a bit of a stretch."
items.summary_zh: Oscar in the press conference: "On a personal level, we have a good understanding as to why the race in Barcelona was such a struggle for me. As a team, Ferrari took a big step forward, Mercedes are still the benchmark and I'm hearing that Red Bull have things here as well. So, it won't be easy for us. To do it on merit or pure pace is a bit of a stretch."
